ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, TSLA) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "ticker_exchange" TEXT /* Exact exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NASDAQ/US, NYSE/US) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was first listed on the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* More specific sector within the industry (e.g., Software, Hardware) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the stock data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the stock is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "pre_market" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous close */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
